seed_vtable_variance_note.text: it turns out that Brickadia only has one extra vfunc in UObject and two in UEngine, and i have been trolled by a UE4SS oversight/bug where because i wasn't also including the default layout defs of UObjectBase & UObjectBaseUtility in the custom VTableLayout.ini file, UE4SS forgot about their virtual functions entirely
